name: Dirt Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the wafers in a plastic bag and spread them into the bottom of large dessert glasses.
2. Blend the custard and cocoa until smooth, then pour it on top of the crushed wafers, leaving about 1/2 inch from the rim of the glass.
3. Poke the jelly worms/snakes/insects into the custard, leaving some on the surface and draped over the rim of the glasses.
4. Chill.
5. Immediately before serving, sprinkle with coco pops.
